summary: Iteration 89 - System Overhaul Testing Complete. All requested features verified: 1) Photographer tools removed from Settings page (moved to Photo Hub), 2) Bookings Manager loads without calendar collision, 3) Set Availability button and modal with time presets working, 4) Create Session button present, 5) Backend availability CRUD APIs working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - Surfer bookings endpoint not found (non-blocking)

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

photographer_tools_removed_from_settings.details: Settings page no longer shows Photographer Tools card - moved to Photo Hub sidebar

bookings_manager_no_calendar_collision.details: Bookings Manager page loads correctly without Calendar component overlap. Uses CalendarIcon for display.

set_availability_button.details: Set Availability button found in header with data-testid='set-availability-btn'

create_session_button.details: Create Session button found in header with data-testid='create-session-btn'

set_availability_modal_time_presets.details: All 6 time presets found: early_morning (05:00-09:00), morning (08:00-12:00), afternoon (12:00-17:00), evening (16:00-19:00), all_day (06:00-18:00), custom (07:00-17:00)

set_availability_modal_recurring_toggle.details: Recurring Weekly toggle present with description 'Repeat these hours every week'

set_availability_modal_calendar.details: Calendar for date selection present when recurring is disabled

photo_hub_vertical_menu.details: Photo Hub sidebar shows: My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions, Earnings Dashboard

api_post_availability.details: POST /api/photographer/{id}/availability creates new availability (single date and recurring)

api_available_slots_for_surfer.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/available-slots?date=YYYY-MM-DD returns available time slots based on photographer's availability minus booked slots

critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js correctly removed Photographer Tools card - now only shows Account, Privacy & Safety, Notifications, Friends sections
PhotographerBookingsManager.js uses CalendarIcon (lucide-react) instead of Calendar component for booking card display - fixes collision issue
Set Availability modal has all 6 time presets with correct time ranges matching spec
Backend PhotographerAvailability model supports both date-specific and recurring availability
available-slots endpoint correctly filters by photographer's availability and excludes already booked slots
PhotoToolsDrawer.js has clean vertical menu: My Gallery → Bookings Manager → Live Sessions → Earnings Dashboard → On-Demand Settings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test photographer account
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Overhaul features fully implemented. Photographer tools moved from Settings to Photo Hub sidebar. Set Availability modal has 6 time presets (Early Morning, Morning, Afternoon, Evening, All Day, Custom) with recurring weekly option. Backend availability CRUD APIs working. Bookings Manager uses CalendarIcon instead of Calendar component to avoid collision.
